uplink.description: Metering 0x09 long frame: full instantaneous block (230.0V, 6.8A, 1500W, 50Hz) plus cumulative energies
uplink._note: Hand-built in-bounds 0x09 long frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (decodeUplink/parseMetering) and mapping voltage dV/10->V, current mA/1000->A, activeEnergy->metering.energy.total, period->derived frequency. Date emitted as RFC3339 UTC (upstream uses non-deterministic toLocaleString).

uplink.description: Metering 0x09 long frame with negative active/reactive power (export, 229.5V, 2.5A, 49.9Hz)
uplink._note: Exercises two's-complement 16-bit active/reactive power and fractional frequency; expected.data derived from reference/upstream-codec.js then normalized.

uplink.description: Metering 0x09 short frame: cumulative energies and activation only (no instantaneous channels)
uplink._note: 21-byte short metering frame; expected.data derived from reference/upstream-codec.js parseMetering (<=42-hex branch). Satisfies power-meter via metering.energy.total.
Upstream returns null -> 'Error on decoding payload'; we author a specific frame-id rejection. Only the 0x09 metering frame carries calibrated power-meter quantities.
0x09 frame with header only, shorter than the 21-byte short form.
